name: Steamed Orange-Spinach
recipeIngredient: Pignoli (pine nuts) or chopped walnuts, to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Stem and wash the spinach, shaking off excess water.
2. Place spinach in a large skillet or wok over high heat with the orange rind and orange juice.
3. Toss until just tender.
4. Serve with pignoli (pine nuts) or chopped walnuts sprinkled on top.
